[{ email: '__PHOTO_WEATHER_EMAIL_TO_2__' }] : [])] }], from: { email: '__EMAIL_FROM__', name: 'Photo Brief' }, subject: '📷 Leeds Photo Brief — ' + $('Code: Build Prompt').first().json.today, content: [{ type: 'text/plain', value: $json.telegramMsg.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, '') }, { type: 'text/html', value: $json.emailHtml }] }) }}
